channel.title: Pages on Daniel's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Daniel's Blog

item.title: About
item.description: I am a college student studying at Central South University (CSU) I like programing.I also like and follow the development of the technology very much.In my free time,i like watching football game and listening music.My football home team is Borussia Dortmund You can get in touch with me or follow me at the link below: Github Telegram: @Daniel_474 Instagram Steam CoolApk This is my blog,I will upload my life and coding practice here.
